checks.description: Guardrail: ensure that during edge-case stimulation no hidden fixed latency is assumed and observable flags eventually reflect the input pattern.
checks.pass_condition: After applying a boundary-value stimulus, at least one of the observed signals changes in a manner consistent with a legal buffer operation; the change may occur any number of cycles later but must not remain permanently X or Z.
checks.trigger_condition: When the plan executes the edge_001 case.

checks.pass_condition: After a legal push or pop operation with EN asserted, the EMPTY and FULL flags eventually settle to values that correctly reflect the buffer occupancy, and dataOut reflects the popped value when a read occurs.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 case is executed.
